title: Evacuation Information - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Disaster Services > Evacuation Information 38 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness 211INFO GORGE CITIZEN ALERT PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF 211info is working in partnership with Gilliam, Hood River, Sherman, and Wasco Counties to support community members who require assistance signing up for local emergency alert systems. Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-6pm Email 211 Visit Website More Details OREGON AND WASHINGTON WILDFIRE INFORMATION OREGON WILDFIRE RESPONSE AND RECOVERY WEBSITE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides information about current wildfires and air quality. Offers a resource directory for wildfire preparation, response, and recovery. Includes evacuation information and a sign-up for emergency alerts through OR-Alert. Provides a list of verified organizations collecting donations for people impacted by wildfire. Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Not applicable Visit Website More Details OREGON AND WASHINGTON WILDFIRE INFORMATION REAL-TIME ASSESSMENT AND PLANNING TOOL FOR OREGON Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides an interactive map that shows current wildfires and evacuation areas in Oregon. Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Not applicable Visit Website More Details OREGON DEPARTMENT OF EMERGENCY MANAGEMENT OR-ALERT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides access to local alerts, warnings, and notifications (AWN) systems for disaster situations and hazard information. Alerts are sent by official public safety and emergency management authorities at the local, county, tribal, and/or state level depending on the scope of the emergency. 3930 Fairview Industrial Drive SE Salem, OR 97302 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Not applicable Email (866) 436-4911 Get Directions Visit Website More Details OREGON DEPARTMENT OF EMERGENCY MANAGEMENT OR-ALERT
